query: Help me interview customers without leading them toward my product idea.
Prepare a customer discovery guide for understanding why shops abandon inventory software.
Analyze these stakeholder interview notes and extract evidence-backed needs.
Choose elicitation techniques for replacing our legacy claims workflow.
Run a requirements workshop to uncover the real order fulfillment process.
Build a story map from our user research and find an end-to-end first slice.
Plan a Big Picture EventStorming session for this cross-department process.
Turn this vague reliability expectation into discovery questions and measurable evidence.
Interview me until you understand what I want you to code.
Write a formal software requirements specification from these approved decisions.
Implement the checkout feature described in this ticket.
Review this PostgreSQL migration for correctness.
Create an architecture decision record for choosing Kafka.
Ask me one question because my prompt is ambiguous.
Design a relational schema from these already-confirmed requirements.
